common.name: Name
common.signedOutDesc: You have been successfully signed out
common.signOutErrorDesc: An error occurred while signing out

home.heroDescription: Transform long URLs into short, memorable links with powerful analytics and tracking.
home.featuresDescription: Everything you need to manage and track your links
home.featureLinkShortening: Transform long URLs into short, memorable links that are easy to share and remember.
home.featureAnalytics: Track clicks, countries, devices, browsers, and more with interactive charts.
home.featureTimeSeries: View your link performance over time with hourly, daily, and weekly aggregations.
home.featureGeographic: See where your clicks are coming from with country and city breakdowns.
home.featureUtm: Understand your marketing campaigns with source, medium, and term tracking.
home.featureQrCode: Generate QR codes for your short links instantly, perfect for print materials and offline marketing.
home.ctaDescription: Create your first short link and start tracking today.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.description: Choose the plan that's right for you. All plans include our core link shortening features.
pricing.faqDescription: Find answers to common questions about our pricing and plans.
pricing.ctaDescription: Join our community on GitHub and start shortening links today.
pricing.faqDifferenceDesc: All plans have the same features. Free and Pro are cloud-hosted, Self-Hosted gives you complete control.
pricing.faqOpenSourceDesc: Yes! JS.GS is 100% open source. All features are available in the self-hosted version completely free.
pricing.faqPayCloud: Why would I pay for the cloud version?
pricing.faqPayCloudDesc: We handle hosting, maintenance, and scaling. You get the same features without managing infrastructure.
pricing.faqSelfHostedVsCloudDesc: Complete control over your data and infrastructure. Perfect for strict data sovereignty requirements.
pricing.faqSelfHostedStart: How do I get started with Self-Hosted?
pricing.faqSelfHostedStartDesc: Check out our GitHub repository for deployment instructions and documentation.
pricing.faqBugs: Where can I report bugs or request features?
pricing.faqBugsDesc: Feel free to open issues on our GitHub repository. We welcome bug reports and feature suggestions!
